## Desired changes

1. Corrections in the files, such as erroneous definitions, etc.
2. Suggestions or creation of **moderation and info** commands for the bot.

## Undesired changes

1. Spelling, grammatical, or white space/formatting changes.
2. Modifications to the general structure and handler of the client.

Contributions to this repository must conform to the [Discord TOS](https://discord.com/tos) and [Discord Guidelines](https://discord.com/guidelines).
